name: laravel-cloud
title: Laravel Cloud
description: Manage your Laravel Cloud applications, deployments, logs, and more directly from Raycast.
author: 1weiho

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Your Laravel Cloud API token. Generate one at cloud.laravel.com.

commands.name: search-applications
commands.title: Search Applications
commands.description: Search and browse your Laravel Cloud applications

commands.name: view-deployments
commands.title: View Deployments
commands.description: View recent deployments across your applications

commands.name: view-logs
commands.title: View Logs
commands.description: View application logs from your environments

commands.name: run-command
commands.title: Run Command
commands.description: Run a command on a Laravel Cloud environment

commands.name: manage-env-vars
commands.title: Manage Environment Variables
commands.description: Manage environment variables for your environments

commands.name: manage-databases
commands.title: Manage Databases
commands.description: Manage database clusters, schemas, and snapshots

commands.name: manage-background-processes
commands.title: Manage Background Processes
commands.description: Manage background processes for your instances

commands.name: manage-buckets
commands.title: Manage Buckets
commands.description: Manage object storage buckets and keys

tools.name: list-applications
tools.title: List Applications
tools.description: List all Laravel Cloud applications with their name, region, and repository

tools.name: get-application
tools.title: Get Application
tools.description: Get details of a specific Laravel Cloud application by ID, including its environments

tools.name: list-environments
tools.title: List Environments
tools.description: List all environments for a given application, showing status, domain, and PHP version

tools.name: get-environment
tools.title: Get Environment
tools.description: Get detailed configuration of an environment including deploy settings and current deployment

tools.name: list-deployments
tools.title: List Deployments
tools.description: List recent deployments for an environment with status, branch, and commit info

tools.name: get-deployment-logs
tools.title: Get Deployment Logs
tools.description: Get the build and deploy logs for a specific deployment

tools.name: get-environment-logs
tools.title: Get Environment Logs
tools.description: Get application logs from an environment, optionally filtered by query or log type

tools.name: list-environment-variables
tools.title: List Environment Variables
tools.description: List all environment variables set on a specific environment

tools.name: list-databases
tools.title: List Databases
tools.description: List all database clusters with their type, status, and region

tools.name: list-domains
tools.title: List Domains
tools.description: List all domains configured for an environment with their verification status

tools.name: trigger-deployment
tools.title: Trigger Deployment
tools.description: Trigger a new deployment for an environment

tools.name: run-command
tools.title: Run Command
tools.description: Run an artisan or shell command on an environment (e.g. php artisan migrate:status)

tools.name: set-environment-variables
tools.title: Set Environment Variables
tools.description: Set one or more environment variables on an environment

tools.name: start-environment
tools.title: Start Environment
tools.description: Start a stopped or hibernating environment

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
